zh.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II是Rauphe Royle的兒子，於大約1568年出生在英國藍卡爾福利斯頓。他於大約1587年與Ellin Milnes在英國爾諾特登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他於1623年住在英國爾諾特登。他去世於1628年10月在英國藍卡爾福利斯頓享年61歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾福利斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II是Rauphe Royle的儿子，于大约1568年出生在英国藍卡爾福利斯頓。他于大约1587年与Ellin Milnes在英国爾諾特登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他于1623年住在英国爾諾特登。他去世于1628年10月在英国藍卡爾福利斯頓享年61岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾福利斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Royle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Royal  .

variants.name: Royal
meanings: English: habitational name from Royle in Burnley (Lancashire), so named from Old English rā ‘roe deer’ + hyll ‘hill’. The surname may have been confused with Rial .
Americanized form of German   Reul   or   Reule  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of Spanish and Portuguese   Real  .

nameMeanings.name: Raphe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Rapp   2.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from La Rappe in the Vosges, so named from Middle French raspe ‘wood cut from a copse, cut brushwood’.

variants.name: Rapp
meanings: German and Swiss German: from Middle High German rapp, rabe ‘raven’, hence a nickname for someone with black hair, or some other supposed resemblance to the bird. In some cases the surname may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a raven.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II was born about 1568, in Flixton, Lancashire, England as the son of Rauphe Royle. He married Ellin Milnes about 1587, in Northenden, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He lived in Northenden, Cheshire, England in 1623. He died in October 1628, in Flixton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Flixton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II est né environ 1568, à Flixton, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de Rauphe Royle. Il a épousé Ellin Milnes environ 1587, à Northenden, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il a vécu à Northenden, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1623. Il est décédé en octobre 1628, à Flixton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Flixton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II wurde um 1568 in Flixton, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von Rauphe Royle geboren. Er hat um 1587 in Northenden, Cheshire, England Ellin Milnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. 1623 hat er in Northenden, Cheshire, England gelebt. Er starb im Oktober 1628 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Flixton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Flixton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II è nato il circa 1568 nel Flixton, Lancashire, England come figlio di Rauphe Royle. Lui sposato Ellin Milnes circa 1587, nel Northenden, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Vissuto a Northenden, Cheshire, England nel 1623. Morì nel ottobre 1628, nel Flixton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Flixton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle IIは約1568年にイギリスランカシュアイアフリクストンでRauphe Royleの息子として生まれた。約1587年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースエンデンでEllin Milnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1623年にはイギリスチェシュアイアノースエンデンに住んでいた。彼は1628年10月にイギリスランカシュアイアフリクストンで61歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアフリクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II(은)는 대략 1568년 영국 랭카실르 플릭스턴에서 Rauphe Royle의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1587년 영국 체실르 노르테든에서 Ellin Milnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 1623년도에 영국 체실르 노르테든에서 살았다. 그는 1628년 10월 영국 랭카실르 플릭스턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 플릭스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II nasceu aproximadamente 1568, em Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de Rauphe Royle. Ele casou-se com Ellin Milnes aproximadamente 1587, em Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele viveu em Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1623. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1628, em Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II родился около 1568 г. в местности фликстон, ланкашир, Англия. Его отца звали Rauphe Royle. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellin Milnes около 1587 г. в местности нортенден, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он жил в местности нортенден, чешир, Англия в 1623 году. Он умер октябрь 1628 г. в местности фликстон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности фликстон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Raphe Royle II nació aproximadamente 1568, en Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de Rauphe Royle. Se casó con Ellin Milnes aproximadamente 1587, en Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Vivió en Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1623. Murió en octubre de 1628, en Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Flixton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
